label: Think node subtree
description: Injects a deep copy of a ThinkTreeDef's root node as a child at runtime. Private in source but treeDef is XML-backed. Inherits all base ThinkNode fields.

treeDef.label: Tree def
treeDef.description: ThinkTreeDef whose thinkRoot is deep-copied and injected as this node's child at resolve time. Private in C# source but loaded from XML.
